title: corybas fenestratus
intro: Corybas fenestratus, also known as the fenestrated hood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas fenestratus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures, which are often consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
